zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Neville 1st Lord Raby於1223年出生在英國達勒姆拉比 煙雨 凱福斯東時，他的父親Sir Geoffrey de Neville 1st Baron de Neville26歲，母親Joan Monmouth19歲。他於大約1240年與Isabel de Ros在英國英格蘭達勒姆拉比結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1263年在英國越可爾被列為sheriff。他去世於1282年8月20日在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾黑利福 赫頓享年59歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾約克。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Neville 1st Lord Raby于1223年出生在英国達勒姆拉比 煙雨 凱福斯東时，他的父亲Sir Geoffrey de Neville 1st Baron de Neville26岁，母亲Joan Monmouth19岁。他于大约1240年与Isabel de Ros在英国英格兰達勒姆拉比结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1263年在英国越可爾被列为sheriff。他去世于1282年8月20日在英国英格兰諾斯 越可爾黑利福 赫頓享年59岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾斯 越可爾約克。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Neville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

variants.name: Nevills
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Nevil
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Newill
meanings: English and Irish (or Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevill
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Neville 1st Lord Raby was born in 1223, in Raby with Keverstone, Durham, England, his father, Sir Geoffrey de Neville 1st Baron de Neville, was 26 and his mother, Joan Monmouth, was 19. He married Isabel de Ros about 1240, in Raby, Durham, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. In 1263, at the age of 40, his occupation is listed as sheriff in Yorkshire, England. He died on 20 August 1282, in Sheriff Hutton, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 59, and was buried in York, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Sheriff Hutton, North Yorkshire, England: Sheriff Hutton, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Neville 1st Lord Raby est né en 1223, à Raby with Keverstone, Durham, Angleterre, son père, Sir Geoffrey de Neville 1st Baron de Neville, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Joan Monmouth, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Isabel de Ros environ 1240, à Raby, Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. En 1263, à l’âge de 40 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff à Everwyck, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 20 août 1282, à Sheriff Hutton, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à York, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Neville 1st Lord Raby 1223 in Raby with Keverstone, Durham, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Geoffrey de Neville 1st Baron de Neville 26 und seine Mutter Joan Monmouth 19. Er hat um 1240 in Raby, Durham, England, United Kingdom Isabel de Ros geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1263, als er 40 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sheriff in Yorkshire, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 20. August 1282 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Sheriff Hutton, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in York, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Isabel de Ros circa 1240, nel Raby, Durham, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Neville 1st Lord Rabyが1223年にイギリスダルハムラビー ウィス ケバーストーンで生まれた時，父Sir Geoffrey de Neville 1st Baron de Nevilleは26歳，母Joan Monmouthは19歳であった。約1240年にイギリスイギリスダルハムラビーでIsabel de Rosと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1263年，40歳の時，イギリスヨークシュアイアでの職業はsheriffと記録されている。彼は1282年8月20日にイギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアシェリッフ ハットオンで59歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアヨークにて埋葬された。

ko.Sheriff Hutton, North Yorkshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 셔이프 후턴
ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Neville 1st Lord Raby(이)가 1223년 영국 뒤람 라비 위스 케버스톤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Geoffrey de Neville 1st Baron de Neville(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Monmouth(은)는 19세였다. 그는 대략 1240년 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 라비에서 Isabel de Ros(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1263년, 40세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 요르크실르에서 sheriff이었다. 그는 1282년 8월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 셔이프 후턴에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 요르크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Neville 1st Lord Raby nasceu em 1223, em Raby with Keverstone, Durham, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Geoffrey de Neville 1st Baron de Neville, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Joan Monmouth, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel de Ros aproximadamente 1240, em Raby, Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Em 1263, com 40 anos, sua profissão aparece como sheriff em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 20 de agosto de 1282, em Sheriff Hutton, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em York, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Sheriff Hutton, North Yorkshire, England: ширифф хуттон, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Neville 1st Lord Raby родился в 1223 г. в местности раби вит кивирстоун, дурам, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Geoffrey de Neville 1st Baron de Neville было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Monmouth, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel de Ros около 1240 г. в местности раби, дурам, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. В 1263 году, в возрасте 40 лет,  он работал по профессии sheriff в местности еркшир, Англия. Он умер 20 августа 1282 г. в местности ширифф хуттон, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности ерк, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Isabel de Ros aproximadamente 1240, en Raby, Durham, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija.
